summary: Well-structured PowerShell code and GitHub Actions workflow follow conventions (Set-StrictMode, error handling, pinned action versions, least-privilege perms). However, deliverable is incomplete and non-functional. Missing critical files: SemanticVersionBumper.Tests.ps1 (referenced in workflow run step), fixture directories (fixtures/minor/, fixtures/major/, fixtures/none/ with package.json and commits.txt inside), and .actrc. Test-Harness.ps1 unconditionally copies .actrc without checking existence—will fail. Workflow expects fixtures to exist; test harness will throw "Fixture directory not found" if they don't. Core library (SemanticVersionBumper.ps1) has solid design and Invoke-Bumper.ps1 is clean, but missing test fixtures and Pester test file mean workflow cannot run. Does not meet requirement: "All tests must be runnable with Invoke-Pester and must pass at the end."
